findings.title: Hardcoded token-like value
findings.description: A token-like value appears in an environment file.
findings.impact: Secrets in source files can be leaked through commits, artifacts, or logs.
findings.remediation: Move secrets to a secret manager and rotate exposed values.

findings.title: Terraform S3 bucket missing versioning
findings.description: The bucket does not define versioning.
findings.impact: Accidental deletion or overwrite events are harder to recover from.
findings.remediation: Enable bucket versioning and lifecycle rules.

findings.title: Missing incident owner
findings.description: The service profile does not define an incident owner.
findings.impact: Incident coordination can be delayed during outages.
findings.remediation: Assign a primary team owner and escalation path.
